name: Fried Eggplant and Ground Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 cups eggplant - cut into 1/2 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch eggplant in boiling water for 30 seconds. Remove.
2. Heat oil and stir-fry garlic, chili, and soy condiment until fragrant.
3. Add pork and stir-fry until color changes.
4. Add eggplant, then sauces (fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, sweet soy sauce), stirring to mix.
5. Finally, add basil and stock and bring to a boil. Serve immediately.
Black-bean paste may also be used.
